parameters.content:
## INPUT FIELDS

`action`: `upsert|get|delete|list`
- example: `upsert`
`rootFolderId`: folder bat dau
- example: `root` or `1AbCdEfGhIjK`
`folderPath`: path con ben trong root folder
- example: `books/book-review/session_20260402`
`fileName`: ten file khi lam viec theo folder context
- example: `Manifest.json`
`fileUrl`: direct Google Drive file URL
- required cho `get`, optional cho `delete`
- example: `https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AbCdEfGhIjK/view`
`binaryFieldName`: ten binary key can upload/update
- example: `file`
`listLimit`: gioi han item khi list
- example: `200`
`listReturnAll`: list het hay gioi han

### Quick examples
`get` by URL -> `{ action: "get", url: "https://drive.google.com/file/d/.../view" }`
`delete` by URL -> `{ action: "delete", url: "https://drive.google.com/file/d/.../view" }`
`upsert` to folder -> `{ action: "upsert", rootFolderId: "root", folderPath: "books/book-review/session_20260402", fileName: "Manifest.json", binaryFieldName: "file" }`
`list` folder -> `{ action: "list", rootFolderId: "root", folderPath: "books/book-review", listReturnAll: true }`
`delete folder` by URL -> `{ action: "delete", url: "https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/.." }`

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const escapeQuery = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'"); const fileName = escapeQuery($json.fileName || ''); const folderId = String($json.targetFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "name = '" + fileName + "' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.document' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.presentation' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.drawing' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.form' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.script' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.site' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.shortcut' and trashed = false and '" + folderId + "' in parents"; })() }}

assignments.name: errorMessage
assignments.value: Missing binary file input. Please pass a binary file field (for example: file) or set binaryFieldName.

parameters.inputDataFieldName: ={{ (() => { const preferred = String($json.binaryFieldName || '').trim(); if (preferred && $binary?.[preferred]) return preferred; const keys = Object.keys($binary || {}); return keys[0] || preferred || 'data'; })() }}
parameters.name: ={{ $json.fileName || '' }}

parameters.inputDataFieldName: ={{ (() => { const preferred = String($json.binaryFieldName || '').trim(); if (preferred && $binary?.[preferred]) return preferred; const keys = Object.keys($binary || {}); return keys[0] || preferred || 'data'; })() }}

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const customQuery = String($json.listQuery || '').trim(); if (customQuery) return customQuery; const folderId = String($json.targetFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "'" + folderId + "' in parents and trashed = false"; })() }}

assignments.name: errorMessage
assignments.value: Target folder path was not found from rootFolderId.

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const escapeQuery = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'"); const segmentName = escapeQuery($json.currentSegment || ''); const parentId = String($json.baseFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "name = '" + segmentName + "' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false and '" + parentId + "' in parents"; })() }}
